tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive returned 0 for private_poc/web/standard with --git-host other

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh from project dir reports Context7 MCP installed and configured

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh --non-interactive from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message in stderr (PR #18 fix verified)

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed sequentially with --complete-step

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent'. Note: check-gate.sh --preflight requires interactive backfill-host prompt and exits 0 even on failure (see bugs)

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression confirmation: no script auto-advances .current_phase after the gate passes — process-checklist.sh only reads .current_phase, never writes it. Manually edited phase-state.json to continue protocol.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after Phase 1 gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all phase1_architecture steps, run check-phase-gate.sh; .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase remains at 0. grep current_phase scripts/process-checklist.sh shows only reads, never writes.
framework_bugs.expected: Some script should advance .current_phase to the next integer after the gate validates.
framework_bugs.actual: No advancement — .current_phase stays at 0 indefinitely; user must hand-edit JSON or use a non-existent CLI command.

framework_bugs.expected: Exit non-zero when preflight fails ('[FAIL] Not ready: protection verification failed').
framework_bugs.actual: Prints '[FAIL] Not ready' but exits 0 — automation can't gate on this. cmd_preflight returns 1 internally but the outer dispatcher case statement does not propagate the return.

framework_bugs.summary: check-gate.sh --backfill-host requires interactive confirm; first run silently aborts
framework_bugs.expected: Either non-interactive mode honored (e.g. --yes flag), or unmistakable failure exit code when stdin is non-tty.
framework_bugs.actual: Inferred host printed, then read prompt fails silently (case match falls through with no input), and the .host field is NOT written. Subsequent --preflight still complains 'manifest.json missing host field'. Caller receives exit 0 (see related bug).

documentation_gaps.gap: No documented command transitions .current_phase between phases. process-checklist.sh --start-phase{1,3,4} only stamps process-state.json; never updates phase-state.json .current_phase.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 6 BUILD_LOOP_STEPS completed sequentially. Stub artifacts: tests/uat-feat-1.test.ts, src/uat-feat-1.ts, docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md (scan stubbed for UAT)

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1):...' succeeded after all steps

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: Direct shell git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' succeeded with exit 0; no Build Loop required. PreToolUse hooks only intercept Claude tool invocations, not raw shell git commits — this is the still-open U-C bug.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1, started uat-feat-2 with full Build Loop and committed successfully (PR #17 BL-006 grace window fix verified)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema; piped {tool_name:Bash,tool_input:{command:'git commit ...'}} to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh — got permissionDecision='deny' with sentinel question echoed

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed file; subsequent gate invocation no longer blocks on sentinel (denies for unrelated phase2_init.verified reason, which is expected)

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006 enforcement
framework_bugs.reproduction: In project, with .build_loop empty: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'
framework_bugs.expected: feat: subject without a recorded Build Loop should be blocked.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds (exit 0). Enforcement only operates through Claude's PreToolUse hook path; no commit-msg / pre-commit git hook is installed by init.sh, so any human or shell-script commit slips through.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: lint-uat-scenarios.sh accepted a stub html with one well-formed scenarios entry; reports 'All 1 scenarios clean.'

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh at phase 3 prints WARN about review-manifest absence and lists Phase 3 tools (license-checker, OWASP ZAP) — exits 0

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: By design for private_poc: process-checklist.sh --start-phase4 exits non-zero with '[FAIL] Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in private poc mode.' This is expected behavior, not a bug. Remaining phase4 tests are N/A for private_poc until upgrade-project.sh --to-production is run (out of scope for base agent).

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: N/A for private_poc base agent — Phase 4 is correctly blocked until upgrade

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git grep for password/api[-_]?key/secret/token finds only template/workflow boilerplate (gitleaks job, vercel/secrets placeholders, eval-prompt docs); no real secrets.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: No .claude/process-audit.log present; no FORCE/reset events occurred — N/A

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged); git status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ dirs that were already untracked at sweep start.

summary: Base private_poc/web/standard run completes through Phases 0-3 cleanly (Phase 4 correctly blocked for private_poc). All PR #16-#19 fixes verified (BL-016 non-interactive init, helper copies, framework-self guard, BL-015 sentinel, BL-006 grace window). Confirmed two known-open Medium bugs (U-C BL-006 shell-bypass, U-D no current_phase advancement) and surfaced two Medium check-gate.sh defects (preflight exit-code propagation; backfill-host non-interactive handling).
